user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase complementary, center-aligned PWM at 20 kHz with 0.5 µs dead-time and 1.0 µs minimum pulse using GTM TOM, with initial duties U/V/W = 25%/50%/75%, pad pushPull and cmosAutomotiveSpeed1 on P02.0/P02.7 (U HS/LS), P02.1/P02.4 (V HS/LS), P02.2/P02.5 (W HS/LS), cmuFxclk0 clock and CH0 as time base on the selected TOM instance.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to configure 3 complementary pairs and center-aligned mode; use IfxGtm_Tom_Timer as time base at 20 kHz sourced from cmuFxclk0; configure P02.* pins via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout with pushPull and cmosAutomotiveSpeed1; compute and set dead-time and minimum pulse; replace PHASE_* macros with IfxGtm_PinMap.h symbols matched to the TC387 package. Mapping check shows P02.* are TOUT0/1/2/4/5/7 on TOM0 for TC387 LFBGA‑516; if using LFBGA‑292, verify the exact TOUTs before finalizing TOM instance. If TOM1 cannot drive P02.*, switch to TOM0 while keeping CH0 as time base.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Mandatory header selection requested and it directly supports complementary PWM with dead-time/min-pulse on GTM TOM for 3-phase inverter. Available in the template and aligns with the existing project structure.

runtime_function.name: GTM_TOM_3_Phase_Inverter_PWM_update
runtime_function.purpose: Maintain complementary, center-aligned operation; adjust dead-time/min-pulse/mode and apply pending shadow updates. Duty initialization at 25/50/75% is applied during setup; further duty updates can reuse the project’s existing PwmHl update routine if present.

driver_changes: Continue using IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl; add explicit IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout calls to replace board PHASE_* macros.

api_changes.reason: Replace board macro with IfxGtm_PinMap.h symbol for P02.0; TOM instance verified as TOM0 on 516 package.
Replace board macro with IfxGtm_PinMap.h symbol for P02.7; TOM instance verified as TOM0 on 516 package.
Replace board macro with IfxGtm_PinMap.h symbol for P02.1; TOM instance verified as TOM0 on 516 package.
Replace board macro with IfxGtm_PinMap.h symbol for P02.4; TOM instance verified as TOM0 on 516 package.
Replace board macro with IfxGtm_PinMap.h symbol for P02.2; TOM instance verified as TOM0 on 516 package.
Replace board macro with IfxGtm_PinMap.h symbol for P02.5; TOM instance verified as TOM0 on 516 package.

migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution keeps complementary, center-aligned PWM at 20 kHz with specified dead-time/min-pulse, assigns the requested P02 pins via IfxGtm_PinMap, and preserves initial duties 25/50/75%. Mapping verification shows P02.* are TOM0 TOUT[0,1,2,4,5,7] on TC387 LFBGA‑516; thus TOM1 cannot drive these pins. Pending user confirmation, select TOM0 with CH0 as time base (requirement to keep CH0 as base remains satisfied). If the actual board uses LFBGA‑292, confirm the P02.* ↔ TOUT/TOM mapping in IfxGtm_PinMap_TC38x_LFBGA292 before finalizing the TOM instance.
